changes.summary: Zone 6 post-split: removed interim ./libs/shared-types/src/schemas.ts from import/no-restricted-paths except; replaced per-file schemas/permissions|notifications entries with ./libs/shared-types/src/schemas/** glob; added Phase 1 V-13 subpath modules (decree809-tag-remap, demo-event-seed-targets, events, merit-transfer, tappalka) alongside existing value-objects/**, taxonomy, value-rubricator. Updated zone 6 and P0-3 messages to Phase 1 Option B subpath-only wording (retires interim schemas.ts ESLint waiver scope; V-13 yaml flag retirement remains orchestrator scope).

verification.domain_monolithic_schemas_import: feed-item-investments.mapper.ts imports @meriter/shared-types/schemas (resolves to schemas.ts) — now outside zone 6 except; intentional until Investment subpath extraction
verification.pnpm_filter_api_lint: skipped — node_modules absent in worktree; static grep confirms schemas.ts removed from except array

notes: Depends on p1-v13-domain-drift-migration (domain barrel imports cleared). Retires interim zone 6 schemas.ts except per TARGET §4.1 Option B; closes ARCH-R28-V13-ESLINT-SCOPE-GAP at eslint boundary. target_architecture.yaml V-13 waiver flag removal out of write_set.
